fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a unique code for a specific miniform.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies your description of the miniform with the code on the header.

fields.name: No. of Records in List
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of records that will be sent to the handheld if the miniform on the header is either Selection List or Data List.

fields.name: Form Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the form type of the miniform.

fields.name: Start Miniform
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this field is the first miniform that will be shown to the user when starting up a handheld.

fields.name: Handling Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the codeunit containing the code that handles this miniform.

fields.name: Next Miniform
fields.tooltip: Specifies which form will be shown next when a selection is made in a Data List form or when the last field is entered on a Card form.

fields.name: XMLin
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use. The program parses the data in this field to be used by the handling codeunit for the current miniform.
